title: How to Actually Build Mobile Apps with AI in 2026 | A Complete Beginner's Tutorial
summary: JavaScript Mastery demonstrates building a Duolingo clone in React Native using "Practical Vibe Coding," a workflow that leverages AI to compress months of development into a weekend. The tutorial covers setup, UI design, authentication via Clerk, state management, and integration of vision agents and streaming capabilities without hand-coding.
